rationale: Candidate a951ecf19d66509588e31373fda1ae923e364c73 is the only one that translated the frontmatter title and subtitle, which is required for a complete translation. It also maintains a more natural and professional tone than the 'current' version (which had some awkward phrasing like 'Erwärmung' and 'Dot-Metazeichen'). I added suggestions to fix the double-escaping in the explanatory text which was likely an LLM artifact.
